[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 10/9 (Mon), Scrimmage reward will be doubled!
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop the exclusive Weapons!

🗓️Period: 10/9 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 10/16 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
